query: SELECT r.id, r.stageId, r.content IS NOT NULL as has_content, LENGTH(r.content) as content_length, r.status, s.name as stage_name FROM reports r LEFT JOIN stages s ON r.stageId = s.id WHERE r.id = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3GB82FZGmc2ADuw.a7b90b108d57 --database jiPvNqaHRUg9H2uZgXUx3J --execute SELECT r.id, r.stageId, r.content IS NOT NULL as has_content, LENGTH(r.content) as content_length, r.status, s.name as stage_name FROM reports r LEFT JOIN stages s ON r.stageId = s.id WHERE r.id = 1;
